description: Collapse the three roadmap-graph surfaces onto one: the cockpit vision model is the single source, lib/roadmap-graph the single renderer. Repoint graph-export + MCP + CLI + CI as thin callers; delete the dead SmartMemory seed and the pre-push staleness chore.

completions.notes: S1-S5 complete: one renderer + one source (vision model); collect.js retired; feature.json status canon (de-sync killed); canonical matches old collector 57/57 nodes 33/33 edges; Codex fixes applied.
